description: Alex Smirnov discusses the importance of real-time connectivity in DeFi at Breakpoint 2024, emphasizing dbridge's role in bridging liquidity across blockchain ecosystems.
topic_summary: At [t=22:08], Alex highlights that 'DeFi doesn't wait' and stresses the need for real-time transactions in DeFi. He explains dbridge's Internet of Liquidity, enabling instant transfers and bridging over $2 billion in liquidity. The upcoming launch of the DBR token on October 17th is also announced.
